from apps.menu.models import MenuItem
import json

items = MenuItem.objects.all\(\)[:3]
for item in items:
    if item.image:
        print\(f''ID: {item.id}''\)
        print\(f''Name: {item.name}''\)
        print\(f''Image path \(model\): {item.image.name}''\)
        print\(f''Image URL: {item.image.url}''\)
        print\(f''Image file exists: {item.image.storage.exists\(item.image.name\)}''\)
        print\(''---''\)
")

Bash(cd "D:/Harshal/Multivendor Food Ecom/backend" && ./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import django, os
os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = 'mealsontimeproject.settings'
django.setup\(\)

# Test signup serializer
from apps.accounts.serializers import RegisterSerializer
data = {
    'email': 'test_debug@example.com',
    'full_name': 'Test User',
    'phone': '9999999999',
    'role': 'customer',
    'password': 'Test@1234',
    'password2': 'Test@1234',
}
s = RegisterSerializer\(data=data\)
if s.is_valid\(\):
    print\('Signup serializer: VALID'\)
    try:
        user = s.save\(\)
        print\(f'User created: {user.email}, id={user.id}'\)
        # Now test login
        from apps.accounts.serializers import LoginSerializer
        login_data = {'email': 'test_debug@example.com', 'password': 'Test@1234'}
        ls = LoginSerializer\(data=login_data\)
        if ls.is_valid\(\):
            print\('Login serializer: VALID'\)
            print\(f'Authenticated user: {ls.validated_data[\\"user\\"]}'\)
        else:
            print\('Login serializer ERRORS:', ls.errors\)
        # Clean up
        user.delete\(\)
        print\('Test user cleaned up'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'User creation ERROR: {type\(e\).__name__}: {e}'\)
else:
    print\('Signup serializer ERRORS:', s.errors\)
" 2>&1)
